name: Giant Octopus
description:
### Special Abilities
[{"name": "Hold Breath", "desc": "While out of water, the octopus can hold its breath for 1 hour."}, {"name": "Underwater Camouflage", "desc": "The octopus has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while underwater."}, {"name": "Water Breathing", "desc": "The octopus can breathe only underwater."}]

### Actions
[{"name": "Tentacles", "desc": "Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it is grappled (escape DC 16). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the octopus can't use its tentacles on another target."}, {"name": "Ink Cloud", "desc": "A 20-foot-radius cloud of ink extends all around the octopus if it is underwater. The area is heavily obscured for 1 minute, although a significant current can disperse the ink. After releasing the ink, the octopus can use the Dash action as a bonus action."}]
